arts.ttl: Derby County January transfer window ins and outs
arts.sum: Derby are aiming to add up to three signings before the close of play on Monday with a defender, midfielder and a winger on the agenda. The window officially closes on Monday at 11pm and it is the final time clubs can do business for contracted players.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Brighton in pole position to land 2.Bundesliga striker and Derby County youngster
arts.sum: Brighton and Hove Albion are close to sealing a move for Stefanos Tzimas of Nurenberg and Derby County’s Eiran Cashin, CaughtOffside has been told. The club are known for their shrewd market activity and the club’s recruitment team has continued this ethos in the winter window. The 19-year-old Greek forward Tzimas has been attracting interest […] The post Exclusive: Brighton in pole position to land 2.Bundesliga striker and Derby County youngster appeared first on CaughtOffside.
